driver_subject: RDMA: Convert various random sprintf sysfs _show uses to sysfs_emit
kernel_subject: sysfs: Add sysfs_emit and sysfs_emit_at to format sysfs output
stage1_reason: All three commits explicitly convert sprintf/snprintf/scnprintf/strcpy to sysfs_emit for sysfs show functions, indicating a kernel API change from v5.10 to v5.11 requiring migration.
stage2_reason: Kernel commit introduces sysfs_emit() API, driver commits migrate from sprintf/snprintf to sysfs_emit for sysfs show functions.
